calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Strike Of Deft Yemane Tesfai To Complaint Of Pltf; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT YEMANE TESFAI'S Motion To Strike Complaint Of Plaintiff is Off calendar. First amended complaint filed 8/14/09. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (301/HEK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem: David Yang; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff in Pro Per Nasir Patel is present.

Defendant Yemane Tesfai is present.
Attorney, Cheryl Kwok, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement (Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal of Action - Move out agreement) for the premises located at 1040 Folsom St., #32, San Francisco, CA, which was NOT FILED.

This case did settle. The trial date of SEP-08-2009 is vacated
